text: Just landed my dream job at Google! Hard work really does pay off. So grateful for everyone who supported me along the way!
The new iPhone update completely destroyed my battery life. Went from lasting all day to dying by 2pm. Thanks Apple.
The weather forecast says it will rain tomorrow with temperatures around 65 degrees.
Cannot believe the ref made that call. Worst officiating I have ever seen in my entire life. Absolute disgrace to the sport.
The new restaurant downtown has decent food. Nothing spectacular but the prices are reasonable for what you get.
My heart is absolutely broken. Lost my best friend of 15 years today. Rest in peace buddy, you were the best dog anyone could ask for.
Finally finished my thesis after 3 years of work! Time to celebrate! The feeling of accomplishment is incredible.
The S&P 500 closed at 4,783 points today, up 0.3% from yesterday's close.
This movie was okay I guess. Some funny parts but overall pretty forgettable. Wouldn't watch it again but don't regret seeing it.
SO excited for the concert tonight! Been waiting for this for months! Best birthday present ever!
